# Habits check-in: Economist / LSAT / 4x-workout

On the 2026-06-02 morning briefing Matteo confirmed all three habits are real commitments and asked for this question to be revisited in two weeks. Surface for the next briefing or brief: are the habits actually running? Did the routine take hold?

The three commitments:
- Read the Economist weekly
- LSAT review weekly
- Four-times-a-week workout

Matteo was also working on a routine design (TASK-133) in early June to make these structurally inevitable.

## then (optional)

If habits are running: celebrate and ask what's working. If not: ask what's blocking and whether any should be officially retired. This is the same question from Q12 of the 2026-06-02 briefing, with two weeks of evidence.
